description: The U.S. Food and Drug Administration granted approval to elacestrant for the treatment of patients who are postmenopausal women or adult men with ER-positive, HER2-negative, ESR1-mutated advanced or metastatic breast cancer with disease progression following at least one line of endocrine therapy.

indication.indication: ORSERDU is an estrogen receptor antagonist indicated for treatment of postmenopausal women or adult men, with ER-positive, HER2-negative, ESR1-mutated advanced or metastatic breast cancer with disease progression following at least one line of endocrine therapy.
